title: ForgeMe
description: Synthetic dataset generator with injected anomalies. Describe your data in plain text, get a dataset with nulls, duplicates, outliers and more — ready for testing your pipelines.

done.title: Nulls, duplicates, outliers
done.desc: Three core anomaly types ready to inject into any dataset

done.title: Raw generation
done.desc: Generate synthetic data from scratch with no input required

done.title: Schema match
done.desc: Upload your schema and get data that fits your structure

done.title: Row count + format
done.desc: Control output size up to 1000 rows, export as JSON or CSV

done.title: Anomaly rate
done.desc: Set what percentage of rows gets corrupted

done.title: Seed control
done.desc: Pin a seed for reproducible results or randomize it

done.title: Copy / Export
done.desc: Copy to clipboard as TSV or download the file directly

next.title: Type mismatches
next.desc: Fields return wrong data types — string where int is expected

next.title: Out-of-order events
next.desc: Records arrive in wrong chronological sequence

next.title: Late arrivals
next.desc: Events timestamped later than they actually occurred

next.title: JSON table view
next.desc: Generated JSON will render as a browsable table

next.title: Open in AnalyzeMe
next.desc: Send your dataset directly to AnalyzeMe for inspection

next.title: Share config by URL
next.desc: Share seed and settings as a link with your team

next.title: LLM schema generation
next.desc: Describe your data in plain text, get a schema instantly

later.title: Stale timestamps
later.desc: Temporal fields stop updating — time appears frozen

later.title: Parquet / Excel export
later.desc: Download in columnar or spreadsheet format

later.title: Column-level anomalies
later.desc: Target specific fields instead of the whole dataset

later.title: Dataset history
later.desc: Save and revisit previous generation runs
